Your Health, Our Priority

Itahari Government Hospital provides affordable, quality healthcare to all citizens of Sunsari and surrounding districts. We are a government-funded hospital serving the community with dignity and care.

✅ Bima / Health Insurance Accepted — Unlike most private hospitals, we proudly support government health insurance schemes.

📋 Book Appointment 🎫 Get Token 🚨 Emergency Service
🏥

Itahari Government Hospital

About Us

Serving Itahari Since 1987

Itahari Government Hospital is a publicly funded healthcare institution located in Itahari, Sunsari, Nepal. Established to provide accessible and affordable medical care to all residents of the region, the hospital operates under the Government of Nepal's health ministry and follows national healthcare standards.

We believe that quality healthcare is a right, not a privilege. Our dedicated team of doctors, nurses, and staff work tirelessly to ensure every patient receives compassionate, professional care regardless of their financial background.

We proudly accept Bima (Health Insurance) for eligible patients, ensuring that no one is turned away due to inability to pay.

  • ✅ Affordable healthcare services for all
  • ✅ Government-supported and publicly funded
  • ✅ Bima / Health Insurance fully accepted
  • ✅ Emergency care available 24 hours, 7 days a week
  • ✅ Qualified doctors and certified medical staff
  • ✅ On-site laboratory and pharmacy services
  • ✅ Maternity and child care facilities
  • ✅ Specialist referral services available
🩺

Our Medical Team

What We Offer

Hospital Services

We provide a wide range of medical services to meet the healthcare needs of our community.

🚨

Emergency Service

Round-the-clock emergency care for accidents, critical conditions, and urgent medical needs. No token required.

Learn More →
🏥

OPD Service

Outpatient Department services for general health checkups, consultations, and follow-up visits.

Learn More →
🛡️

Bima / Insurance Service

We accept government health insurance (Bima). Eligible patients can receive treatment covered by their health card.

Learn More →
💊

Pharmacy

On-site pharmacy providing prescribed medicines at subsidised government rates for patients.

Learn More →
🔬

Laboratory Test

Blood tests, urine tests, and other diagnostic laboratory services at affordable government prices.

Learn More →
📷

X-Ray and Ultrasound

Digital X-ray and ultrasound imaging services for accurate diagnosis and treatment planning.

Learn More →
🤰

Maternity Service

Safe delivery services, antenatal checkups, and postnatal care for mothers and newborns.

Learn More →
👶

Child Care

Paediatric consultations, vaccinations, and child health monitoring by our specialist doctors.

Learn More →
🚑

Ambulance Service

Emergency ambulance service available for patient transport to and from the hospital.

Learn More →
👨‍⚕️

Specialist Doctors

Consultations with specialist doctors in gynaecology, paediatrics, dental, and other departments.

Learn More →

Book Appointment
Health Insurance

Bima / Health Insurance Service

Itahari Government Hospital is proud to be a Bima-registered hospital. Eligible patients can access medical treatment using their government health insurance card. Unlike many private hospitals, we fully support the national health insurance programme.

How Bima Works Here

  • 🛡️ Bima service is available for OPD consultations
  • 🛡️ Laboratory and diagnostic tests are covered
  • 🛡️ Prescribed medicines from pharmacy are included
  • 🛡️ Selected surgical and inpatient treatments covered
  • 🛡️ Maternity and child care services are eligible
  • 📄 Bring your Bima card, citizenship card, and hospital referral documents
  • 📄 Insurance must be active and valid on the date of visit
  • 📄 Go to the Bima counter at the reception before consulting a doctor

Bima Coverage Table

Service Bima Available Required Document Remarks
OPD Consultation Yes Bima Card, Citizenship All departments
Laboratory Tests Yes Bima Card, Doctor Referral Standard tests only
Pharmacy / Medicines Yes Bima Card, Prescription Listed medicines only
X-Ray / Ultrasound Yes Bima Card, Referral Form As per Bima limit
Inpatient / Surgery Partial Bima Card, Citizenship, ID Selected procedures
Emergency No — Free emergency care provided
Queue Management

Online Token Booking

Book your appointment token online to avoid long queues at the hospital reception.

Book Your Token

Sample Token Card

This is how your token receipt will look

🏥 Itahari Government Hospital

Itahari, Sunsari, Nepal | Bima Accepted

A-102

Token Number

Patient NameExample Patient
DepartmentGeneral OPD
DoctorDr. Ram Kumar
Date25 June 2026
Time10:30 AM
Queue Status⏳ Waiting
Bima Status✅ Available

📌 Important Token Information

  • Patients should arrive at least 15 minutes before their scheduled time.
  • Token number is valid only for the selected date.
  • Bima patients must bring their Bima card and citizenship card.
  • Emergency patients do not need to wait for a token.
  • Patients should report to the reception desk after arriving.

Patient Registration

Register as a new patient to receive a unique hospital ID and streamline your future visits.

Schedule

Doctor Availability Schedule

Token Department Doctor Name Available Days Morning Time Afternoon Time Max Tokens/Day Room No.
A General OPD Dr. Ram Kumar Sun – Fri 9:00 AM – 12:00 PM 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM 50 Room 101
B Gynaecology Dr. Sita Sharma Sun – Thu 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM 30 Room 202
C Paediatrics Dr. Anil Thapa Sun – Fri 9:30 AM – 12:30 PM 2:30 PM – 4:30 PM 35 Room 105
D Dental Dr. Maya Rai Mon – Fri 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM Not Available 25 Room 303
E Emergency Emergency Doctor Every Day 24 Hours 24 Hours Unlimited Emergency Block

⚠️ Doctor schedules may change due to emergency duty, leave, or government hospital programmes. Please contact the reception desk before visiting.

Departments

Hospital Department Schedule

Department Doctor Name Available Days Time Room Number
General OPD Dr. Ram Kumar Sun – Fri 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM Room 101
Gynaecology Dr. Sita Sharma Sun – Thu 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM Room 202
Paediatrics Dr. Anil Thapa Sun – Fri 9:30 AM – 4:30 PM Room 105
Dental Dr. Maya Rai Mon – Fri 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM Room 303
Emergency Emergency Doctor Every Day 24 Hours Emergency Block
Laboratory Lab Technician Sun – Fri 8:00 AM – 3:00 PM Lab Room (Ground Floor)
Pharmacy Pharmacist on Duty Every Day 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM Pharmacy Counter
Find Us

Contact Information

Hospital Details

  • 📍 Address: Itahari, Sunsari, Nepal
  • 📞 Phone: 025-580100
  • 🚨 Emergency: 025-580100 (24/7)
  • 📧 Email: info@itaharihospital.gov.np

Opening Hours

  • 🕗 OPD: Sunday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
  • 🕗 Pharmacy: Every Day, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
  • 🚨 Emergency: 24 Hours, 7 Days a Week
  • 🗓️ Closed: Saturday (Emergency open)
